name: Token Standard Selection
description: Choose between SPL Token and Token-2022 for your Solana token

tree.question: Do you need any of these advanced features?

Transfer fees (tax on every transfer).rationale: Token-2022 has native transfer fee extension. Fee is enforced at the protocol level — can't be bypassed.
Transfer fees (tax on every transfer).tradeoffs: Some DEXes don't fully support transfer-fee tokens yet. Jupiter does. Raydium does. Orca partial.

Confidential transfers (hidden amounts).rationale: Token-2022 confidential transfers use zero-knowledge proofs to hide transfer amounts. Only sender and receiver see the amount.
Confidential transfers (hidden amounts).setup: Complex setup — use the Confidential Transfers official skill for guidance.
Confidential transfers (hidden amounts).tradeoffs: Experimental. Limited DEX support. Higher compute cost per transfer.

Interest-bearing token (accruing yield).rationale: Token-2022 interest-bearing extension tracks accrued interest without rebasing. Good for yield-bearing tokens.
Interest-bearing token (accruing yield).tradeoffs: Interest is display-only — doesn't actually mint new tokens. You handle the underlying yield.

Non-transferable token (soulbound).rationale: Token-2022 non-transferable extension makes tokens soulbound. Good for credentials, achievements, reputation.
Non-transferable token (soulbound).tradeoffs: Cannot be listed on any DEX (by design). No secondary market.

On-chain metadata (no Metaplex dependenc.rationale: Token-2022 metadata extension stores name, symbol, URI directly on the mint account. No separate Metaplex metadata account needed.
On-chain metadata (no Metaplex dependenc.tradeoffs: Simpler than Metaplex but less ecosystem tooling. Metaplex has better indexer/marketplace support.

None — just a standard fungible token.rationale: Standard SPL Token (Token program). Maximum compatibility with all DEXes, wallets, and tools. The safe default.
None — just a standard fungible token.setup:
spl-token create-token
spl-token create-account <mint>
spl-token mint <mint> <amount>
None — just a standard fungible token.metadata: Add Metaplex metadata: use @metaplex-foundation/mpl-token-metadata for name, symbol, image.
None — just a standard fungible token.tradeoffs: No advanced features. Need Metaplex for metadata (separate account, extra rent).

NFT or semi-fungible token.rationale: Metaplex Core is the latest NFT standard. Simpler than legacy Metaplex (single account vs. multiple). Supports collections, plugins, royalties.
NFT or semi-fungible token.setup: Use Metaplex Umi framework to create assets.
NFT or semi-fungible token.tradeoffs: Newer standard — some marketplaces may not support it yet. Legacy Metaplex (Token Metadata) has wider support.

compatibility_note: SPL Token works everywhere. Token-2022 works on Jupiter, Raydium, Phantom, Solflare. Check specific DEX/wallet support before choosing Token-2022 extensions.
